text: # WATCHDOG [nttps: //github. con/geosolut ions—it/scripts/blob/master/watchdog/watchdog. sh geoserver—docker] (https://github. con/ geosolutions-it/scripts/blob/master/watchdog/watchdoo. shiz8geoserver-docker) GIRA U HOST *bash /opt/geoserver/scripts/vatchdog. sh SPORT SSERVICE # ESENPIO Jopt/geoserver/scripts/watchdog.sh 8090 geoserver-naster Log in /opt/geoserver/scripts/watchdog.sh 8030 geoserver-naster # CRONTAB Jetescrontab *bash # WATCHDOG %/10 % % % = root /opt/geoserver/scripts/watchdog.sh 8099 geoserver-naster >/dev/null 2561
